MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter not reported

Plaintiff IWorkGlobal LLC appearing represented by Sydney Fairbairn, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Aktana Inc. not appearing.

This matter is continued to November 7, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow the Plaintiff an oppertunity to provide this department with courtesy copies of the relevant filings for the court's review.
